text:
Fix: 

Hello!

I fix port:`xloadface-1.6.1'
(ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/
                                     xloadface-ports.1206.tar.gz)

In article <199612061323.FAA00306@dragon.nuxi.com>
"David O'Brien" <obrien@NUXI.com> writes:
>
> I imported your port of xloadface.  Satoshi and I were both testing it on the
> FreeBSD.org machines and found that at first it would report good things, but
> after 1-2 minutes would say machines went down (that we know didn't -- like
> freefall.freebsd.org).
>
> If you get a chance, could you grab the port from
> ftp.freebsd.org:/pub/FreeBSD/ports-current/sysutils/xloadface and see
> if it works correctly for you.
